## Chess coaching that explains the _why_.

Most analysis tools tell you the best move. We tell you why it's best—the threat you missed, the square that matters, what to look for next. In plain English, right where you play.

Browser extension:

Firefox & Chrome · coming soon

Caruana vs Sibelephant · move 12

Best Ne2

The main idea is a knight maneuver to f5 — **Ne2 starts the route c3→e2→g3→f5**, planting a permanent outpost Black can never challenge with a pawn. Once it reaches f5, it dominates the kingside and coordinates with the g4-h3 pawn chain for a direct attack.

Goal Nf5 ♞

Opening Analysis Coaching

How it works

## At the board. At the desk.

The extension follows you while you play. The desktop app is where you study.

01

♟

### Browser Extension · coming soon

Open a game on Chess.com or Lichess—your coach is already in the sidebar. Click any move and get an explanation: what you missed, what the position needed, what's coming next. No tab-switching, no pasting FENs anywhere.

Chess.com Lichess Firefox Chrome

02

🖥

### Desktop App

Link your Chess.com or Lichess account and your games sync automatically. Step through any game at your own pace, get full move-by-move coaching, and build a real picture of where your play breaks down.

macOS Game Library Deep Analysis

* * *

Features

## Coaching, not just analysis

💬

### Annotated moves, not scores

Every move gets a quality label—brilliant, best, good, inaccuracy, mistake, blunder—with a written explanation attached. Not just a number. An actual reason.

🖱️

### Click any move, get coached

Step through a game and click any move—yours or your opponent's. The coach explains what the position called for, what you did, and what the difference was. Good moves included.

💡

### Key factors, surfaced upfront

Before the move-by-move breakdown, you see the critical positional factors—king safety, piece activity, pawn structure, open files. The coaching connects back to them throughout.

🗣️

### Ask follow-up questions

Not satisfied with an explanation? Ask. "What if I'd played Nc6 instead?" or "Why is the e-file important here?"—the coach knows the position and answers in context.

📚

### Your full game history

Games from Chess.com and Lichess sync automatically. Every game you've played is available to review, with coaching on demand.

💰

### Cost you can see

AI usage billed at provider rates, not marked up and hidden. Set a monthly cap. See what you spent. No surprises.

Download

## Get started wherever you play.

Install the desktop app to study your games, the browser extension to get coaching while you play, or join Discord to analyze positions with friends.

### Desktop App — macOS

Requires macOS 11 or later, Apple Silicon. Sign in, link your Chess.com or Lichess username, and your games start syncing.

[↓ Download for Mac](https://aichess.coach/downloads/AI.Chess.Coach.dmg)

### Browser Extension

Coming soon for Chrome and Firefox. The extension puts your coach right in the sidebar while you play on Chess.com or Lichess.

Firefox & Chrome · coming soon

### Desktop App — Windows

Windows app is in development. Sign up to be notified when it's ready.
